# SESSION BRIEF — Auto-generated from memory files
# Generated: 2026-07-01 16:09 by session-start.sh sync
# Source: /Users/abarihm/.claude/projects/-Users-abarihm/memory

---

## ACTIVE PROJECTS (from memory)
**client-pyramid** — THE CLIENT PYRAMID + 3-client pilot (June 11) — the client profile/diagnose/archive/track system, its laws, machines, and pilot state. Read before ANY client work.

**project-creation-system-top** — Mohamed's THE-TOP ruling (June 13) — the main goal is the system that CREATES posts + its strategy + approvals architecture

**project-dev-platform-handoff** — June 27 PIVOT — the goal is now to prepare ogz-knowledge as the CONNECTABLE BRAIN for the developer-built customer platform (o-gz-studios-web-hlhi.vercel.app). Drop scaling; the devs own infra/real-AP

**ogz-play-room-platform-dashboard** — Play Room is the OGZ internal OS dashboard — Next.js 16 + React 19 at port 4000. 21 view components, 5 pages (os, bd, crm, intake, portal). Last committed April 12 (cloud-mode guards). 25 files uncomm

**project-ogz-build-state** — OGZ build state as of June 22 2026 — what's done (gates, model-resilience, Art-Director v1), what's LIVE vs SHADOW (taste at 33% but that's noise on a sparse graph, not a broken model — needs his brid

**ogz-knowledge-base-extraction-project** — Brain v4.3+. 6,888 obs, 60 brands. Multi-LLM caption pipeline — 221-brief matrix, 5 CD brains, V3 XML prompt + English mode. 568 captions (Claude 221 / HUMAIN 206 / GPT-4o 141), 215 score ≥87,

(founder_taste_fresh 17-day gap · feedback_system readiness_honest) — staged, not blockers.

reviews.jsonl but build_audience_mirror.py read ONLY raw/instagram comments. Added pure reader
latest_maps_reviews() + folded reviews into the tally corpus + reviews_count provenance. 3 offline
tests (no LLM/money), suite green. Panel (RABIE+DeepSeek) 3/5 CONDITIONAL PASS.
**NEXT / MISSING:** (1) B286 orchestra self-terminate — code BUILT (scripts/orchestra_self_terminate.py
228L, Jun 29) but UNWIRED into the fire + unverifiable under load (needs load<2, was 5.69); wire+verify
on a calm box. (2) build_audience_mirror.py is standalone — not called by any pipeline (DeepSeek). (3)
fetcher monthly auto-schedule = Mohamed-gated money (B239c-like).

# CURSOR — prior · updated 2026-06-30

## ⭐ JUNE 30 — GATE0 anti-hallucination matcher HARDENED (consult-first, Rule #19) · boshed 1ddca153
**Done:** closed two product_is_real() fail-opens (scripts/truth_guards.py) that let a HALLUCINATED
product clear the FAL-spend gate (Rule #12): (1) raw-substring over all profile/*.json passed a
greeting «عيد أضحى مبارك»; (2) any single ≥4-char caption token passed «أي منتج وهمي» (common word
«منتج»). Now: STRUCTURED read of product_truth.json only (both shapes: albaik top-level keys /
jurisha+alnasser d["products"]); pass only if query⊆real-name tokens; if client HAS product_truth
it's the AUTHORITY (no caption back-door); corpus fallback only for no-product_truth brands (full
phrase OR ≥2 sig tokens, never a single). Also render_openclaw GATE0 `except: pass` → FAIL-CLOSED.
**Test:** tests/test_truth_guards.py — 19 cases, exit 0 (real pass, fakes refuse, 3 live clients);
caption gauntlet still green. **Consulted DeepSeek+RABIE before+after: VERIFIED, no fail-open.**
**Residual (flagged, task_6f6385da):** no-product_truth brands (ecoffeecup/lnasserjewelry/myfitness)
can still pass a verbatim greeting via caption-overlap → give them product_truth or tighten that path.
